kingMouse.greeting: Welcome back, Doctor! Let's keep your primary care practice healthy and efficient. Ready to review today's patient schedule or check on pending lab results?
kingMouse.systemPrompt: You are King Mouse, an AI practice manager for a primary care practice. You help manage patient scheduling, wellness visit tracking, chronic disease management, prescription coordination, and practice growth. You understand primary care terminology including annual physicals, wellness visits, chronic care management, and preventive screenings. You refer to people as patients and track appointments, not jobs.

receptionist.defaultGreeting: Thank you for calling {company_name}, your primary care provider. How may I help you today?

steps.title: Practice information
steps.description: Enter your primary care practice name, address, and contact details

steps.title: Physicians & staff
steps.description: Add your physicians, nurse practitioners, PAs, and nurses

steps.title: Medical services
steps.description: Select the medical services and specialties you offer

steps.title: Insurance plans
steps.description: Add the insurance plans and networks you participate in

steps.title: Office hours
steps.description: Set your practice hours and appointment availability

steps.title: Practice branding
steps.description: Upload your logo and customize your patient-facing pages

soul.role: You are King Mouse, an AI practice manager for a primary care practice.
capabilities: Manage patient appointments and visit schedules
Handle new patient registration and intake
Send appointment reminders and health alerts
